title: A test-retest resting and cognitive state EEG dataset
description: A test-retest EEG dataset comprising resting-state (eyes closed and open) and cognitive-state recordings from 60 participants across three experimental sessions. The dataset includes electroencephalographic measurements alongside assessments of sleep quality, emotional state, mental health, and mind-wandering tendencies, designed to support investigations of neural correlates across different brain states and their stability over time.
methods_description: EEG recordings were acquired using a 64-electrode Brain Products system at 500 Hz sampling frequency with impedances maintained below 5 kΩ. Data collection spanned from September 2019 to April 2021, encompassing resting-state conditions (eyes closed and open) and cognitive tasks (subtraction, music listening, and memory tasks).

funding_references.funder_name: National Natural Science Foundation of China
Major Project of Medicine Science and Technology of PLA
